control_items.name: UK-Switzerland CR&D Round 3

unlock_contacts.target: Swiss engineering biology ecosystem via BaseLaunch / The Cultured Hub / Buhl

evidence_required_to_unlock: Swiss implementation partner confirms participation and authorised contact.
At least one required research institute is identified, or written waiver/route guidance confirms the research-institute requirement is not applicable.
Partner commitment letter or equivalent written commitment is received.
Partner budget, eligible-cost split, work-package split, and project role are evidenced.
Permit/licence and export-control positions are documented for the proposed scope.
Project finances and Project Impact values can be completed without guessing.
control_items.portal_action_after_unlock: Only after every evidence item above is present: resume IFS draft 10210100 and complete partner, finance, export/permit, and Project Impact sections from evidence.

control_items.name: Commercialising Knowledge Assets Fund (CKAF) Autumn
evidence_required_to_unlock: Eligible public-sector research organisation or PRSE/UKRI wholly owned institute confirms lead applicant role.
Knowledge asset ownership and IP/right-to-commercialise position are evidenced.
Senior support or authorised lead evidence is received.
Aureon/R&A support or procurement role is authorised and compliant with CKAF rules.
control_items.portal_action_after_unlock: Only after every evidence item above is present: support an eligible public-sector lead; do not submit as R&A lead.

control_items.name: DRIVE35 Innovation Fund: Collaborate 3
evidence_required_to_unlock: Vehicle manufacturer, Tier 1 supplier, or eligible automotive lead confirms participation.
Zero-emission vehicle work package and Aureon/R&A role are confirmed.
Match funding and partner budget evidence are received.
Eligible budget, consortium role, and delivery responsibility are documented.
control_items.portal_action_after_unlock: Only after every evidence item above is present: create or complete DRIVE35 Collaborate 3 draft under the evidenced consortium/lead.

control_items.name: DRIVE35: Scale Up Fund
evidence_required_to_unlock: Zero-emission vehicle manufacturing facility or site is identified and authorised for the project.
Co-investment evidence and capital investment plan are received.
Eligible GBP5m-plus project cost basis and delivery capacity are documented.
Manufacturing scale-up plan, site role, and Aureon/R&A role are evidenced.
control_items.portal_action_after_unlock: Only after every evidence item above is present: evaluate whether a Scale Up Fund application is appropriate; keep out of immediate queue until facility and co-investment are real.

control_items.name: Zero Emission Vessels and Infrastructure 2: Alternative Fuels
evidence_required_to_unlock: UK maritime lead confirms role and eligibility.
Alternative-fuel vessel or infrastructure asset is identified with permission to reference.
Three-year demonstration commitment, site, permit, insurance, and safety basis are documented.
Eligible budget, match funding or partner costs, and Aureon/R&A role are evidenced.
control_items.portal_action_after_unlock: Only after every evidence item above is present: create or complete ZEVI2 Alternative Fuels draft under the evidenced maritime lead and asset.

control_items.name: Zero Emission Vessels and Infrastructure 2: Electric Power
evidence_required_to_unlock: UK maritime lead confirms role and eligibility.
Electric-power vessel or infrastructure asset is identified with permission to reference.
Three-year demonstration commitment, site, permit, insurance, and safety basis are documented.
Eligible budget, match funding or partner costs, and Aureon/R&A role are evidenced.
control_items.portal_action_after_unlock: Only after every evidence item above is present: create or complete ZEVI2 Electric Power draft under the evidenced maritime lead and asset.

control_items.name: Zero Emission Vessels and Infrastructure 2: Energy Efficiency
evidence_required_to_unlock: UK maritime lead confirms role and eligibility.
Vessel or infrastructure asset is identified with permission to reference.
Three-year demonstration commitment, site, permit, insurance, and safety basis are documented.
Eligible budget, match funding or partner costs, and Aureon/R&A role are evidenced.
control_items.portal_action_after_unlock: Only after every evidence item above is present: create or complete ZEVI2 Energy Efficiency draft under the evidenced maritime lead and asset.

control_items.name: Scaling performance of quantum computing hardware: CR&D
evidence_required_to_unlock: Eligible quantum hardware business or RTO lead confirms role.
Hardware/facility access, facility owner, or device-level platform is evidenced.
Consortium commitment, partner roles, and partner budgets are documented.
Performance roadmap, validation plan, and Aureon/R&A support role are confirmed.
control_items.portal_action_after_unlock: Only after every evidence item above is present: create or complete quantum hardware CR&D draft with the evidenced hardware lead and consortium.

control_items.name: Innovation Loans Expression of Interest
evidence_required_to_unlock: Specific action-time approval confirms the company deliberately wants repayable finance rather than grant funding.
Repayment capacity evidence, cash-flow forecast, loan amount, interest/repayment affordability, and credit-risk pack are available.
The route is confirmed as suitable for the business and not mixed into the grant-submit queue.
Any finance-sensitive evidence is handled outside public grant artifacts and without copying private bank details into logs.
control_items.portal_action_after_unlock: Do not submit as a grant. Only consider a loan EOI after deliberate repayable-finance approval and finance evidence are present.

do_not_mark_submit_ready_until: Every required route-specific evidence item is present in an auditable local or Drive/Gmail-derived artifact.
The evidence identifies authorised legal entities, named contacts, partner roles, assets/sites, budgets, permissions, facilities, and permitted Aureon/R&A role.
The IFS portal answers can be completed without guessing partner, lead, finance, asset/site, facility, permit, export, IP, budget, or loan facts.
The final portal submission receives exact action-time approval for the destination application and payload.

controls: No IFS portal field was changed.
No partner invitation, upload, award terms acceptance, or final submission was performed.
Innovation Loans remains outside the grant queue unless repayable finance is deliberately approved.
This packet is an internal Aureon submission control artifact, not a representation that evidence exists.
